SVG: four-panel soil-pH sampling apparatus — 1) trowel digging at 5 cm, 2) drying oven with petri dishes, 3) distilled-water bottle and beaker with 50 g soil + clock, 4) pH probe in soil/water slurry.
SVG: hydrangea soil-pH data table — rows Blue/Purple/Pink/White with Trial 1-3 + Average columns, pink-highlighted blank for Blue average, flower illustrations beside each row.
SVG: Step 1 of Zoysia-grass pH method — terracotta pot labelled pH 5 next to digital balance reading 200 g of soil on weighing paper.
SVG: Step 2 — five terracotta pots in a row labelled pH 5–9 (first has soil, rest empty).
SVG: Step 3 — five soil-filled pots labelled pH 5–9 each containing five grass seeds visible at the surface.
SVG: Step 4 — January calendar (2 weeks) next to five pots labelled pH 5–9 with water droplets falling onto them.

SVG: mushroom life-cycle stages along a soil cross-section — Spores in soil, Germinating spores, Developing mushroom (small cap + roots), Mature mushroom (large cap, stem with ring, extensive mycelium).

SVG: two ecosystem-services panels — Products (edible mushrooms + fruits/berries/nuts + syringe medicines) and Regulation (tree+CO2 carbon fixation arrows, fox for organism health, root erosion prevention).

SVG: two ecosystem-services panels — Cultural (picnic, tent labelled Well-being, head silhouette with heart icon) and Support (forest with squirrel, Habitats label, nutrient-cycling circle in soil cutaway).

SVG: carbon-cycle landscape — sun + clouds, ocean (carbonates in water), volcano, forest, tilled farmland with tractor, cows, factory emissions, log truck, fossil-fuel underground deposit; white arrows showing CO2 exchange between atmosphere, ocean, biosphere, fossil fuels.

SVG: three-panel forest-regeneration comparison — Natural regeneration (two mature trees marked with X kept as seed trees, seedlings sprouting), Direct seeding (kneeling person scattering seeds), Planting seedlings (kneeling person with red pot planting a seedling).

SVG: hand-vs-machine planting comparison — left panel shows person standing with spade and second person planting seedling by hand (label 'Hand 2 people 1000–2000 trees per day'); right panel shows tractor pulling a yellow planter attachment with seedling trays over ploughed rows (label 'Machine 2 people 8000–10 000 trees per day').
SVG: planted-seedling field with irrigation — perspective rows of raised soil ridges, young seedlings along each row, fan-spray sprinklers watering them; horizon trees and blue sky.
